steps.title: Graph the system
steps.content:
Enter the equations as written, one per row:
$$
y=-2x
$$
$$
3x+y=40
$$
The solution is the intersection point.

steps.title: Solve by substitution
steps.content: Substitute $y=-2x$ into the second equation: $$ 3x+(-2x)=40 $$ So $$ x=40 $$ The answer is 40.
